description.default: Prevent modifications to lock files (package-lock.json, yarn.lock, pnpm-lock.yaml).

antigravity.command: jq -r '.toolInput.path // empty' | grep -qE '(package-lock|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock)' && echo '{"decision":"deny","message":"Blocked: lock files are protected"}' || echo '{"decision":"allow"}'
